_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assist in the development and refinement of priority information requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-020 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-002 (DG, cosine: 0.519), OP-A-001 (OP, cosine: 0.518).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.566). Shared vocabulary: [priority]. DCWF-only terms [assist, development, information, refinement, requirements] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, approach, assessment, build, cases, concepts] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.897, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Assist in the development and refinement of priority information requirements." and "Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.541 ≈ STS 0.566 (gap 0.025). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [priority] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [priority]. DCWF-only: [assist, development, information, refinement, requirements]. WIDAI-only: [ai, approach, assessment, build, cases, concepts].
